name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: Are people underestimating us again?
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Here's how a writer for _The New York Times_ described our chances on the day we launched a little less than a year ago:
"Hillary Rodham Clinton is poised to win the Democratic nomination without a serious contest." - April 30, 2015
A _BuzzFeed_ editor said Bernie was not "a serious candidate." A writer for _The Washington Post_ said 12 percent was a "reasonable ceiling for Sanders."
The truth is, the corporate media has written us off from day one. But time and time again, we've defied the odds and proved them wrong. And after everyone sees the results from tomorrow's caucuses, with more than 140 delegates up for grabs, the establishment of this country will know we are about to defy the odds yet again.
[**Rush a $3 contribution to Bernie 2016 ahead of tomorrow 's critical caucuses in Washington, Alaska, and Hawaii. Your donation will make a real difference in our efforts to reclaim the delegate lead.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-corporate-media?refcode=em160325-full-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-corporate-media?refcode=em160325-full-e")
As we continue to work towards a successful Saturday set of caucuses, here's what comes next: Wisconsin votes in a week and a half. That's a big and important contest. Then comes Wyoming, where we hope to do very well. Then it's New York on April 19, less than a month away.
We are organizing. We are fighting for every vote and caucus-goer. And if we continue to stand together, we are going to win. People should not underestimate us.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-corporate-media?refcode=em160325-full-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-corporate-media?refcode=em160325-full-e")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rand Paul
subject: Can you imagine?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for U
body:
Dear Patriot:

From the vacancy in the Supreme Court, to
protecting the 2nd Amendment from the Obama Administration, to
preventing a possible Clinton administration, we've got our work
cut out for us.

2016 is shaping up to be a year more
important than I had ever imagined.

Building a strong liberty presence in the
Senate is becoming more and more crucial.

That's why I need your support today to help
me win in Kentucky and get us one step closer to maintaining a
much-needed GOP majority in the fall.

Earlier this week, my team put together and
End of Quarter Money Bomb to help get us through the next steps
in the campaign. If you can, watch my video to hear a little more
about why this deadline is so important.

We really have so much at stake.

Can you imagine what Hillary Clinton could do
with a Democrat majority? Can you imagine that disaster?

Now is really the time to come together to
ensure a better future for our country.

A big fundraising turnout this quarter can
help us build momentum and send a message to the Washington
machine that no matter who wins the White House, the Senate will
be standing strong for liberty.

I hope you can stand with me to protect our
freedoms by joining our end-of-quarter goals today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $10 TODAY >>

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for U.S. Senate 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: ted@tedcruz.org
subject: I need to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Time is running out... I'm hopeful that you'll read this message and respond right away. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419292:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)
---
Friend,

Time is running out...

I'm hopeful that you'll read this message and respond right away.

Here's the situation: my FEC mandated End-of-Quarter deadline is in just FIVE DAYS. **And after an emergency meeting with my finance director this morning -- I've learned that we're in danger of falling behind.**

This is cause for concern -- take a look:

| | | To: [ted@tedcruz.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419292:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)
From: [lauren.l@tedcruz.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419292:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)
Date: March 26th 9:15 AM EST
Subject: RE: Q1 report

Ted,

I've confirmed this is right...

Per our emergency meeting earlier, we are short $431,949 of our campaign's must-hit, End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline.

\- Lauren
---|---|---

We're coming up short right before this campaign's most important fundraising deadline.

We can't afford to miss. Will you use one of the secure, instant donate links below to make an immediate, FEC deadline donation of $1,000, $250, $100, $50, or $35?

[**EOQ DONATION: I can chip in $35 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419293:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)

[**EOQ DONATION: I can chip in $50 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419294:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)

[**EOQ DONATION: I can chip in $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419295:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)

[**EOQ DONATION: I can chip in $250 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419296:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)

[**EOQ DONATION: I can chip in $1000 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419297:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)

Friend, after [March 31st,](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419292:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r) EVERY presidential campaign must file financial reports with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) detailing contributions and expenditures.

And once results are public, the liberal media will begin scrutinizing every line of my report looking for weakness.

They're watching for these reports and hoping we miss our goals so they can launch a new round of attacks, but here's the scary part -- if we miss the deadline, we're going to have nothing to fight back with.

[**That's why I'm personally asking you to chip in $35 or $50 right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419292:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)

If you've read the papers, looked online, or watched the news, then you've already seen plenty of headlines attacking me. You have done so much already, but this is the critical test of our 2016 Presidential Campaign.

**Friend, I want to thank you, but I also must ask again can I count on you to help me right now?**

You know where I stand.

It is no secret that I stood against the Washington cartel and the special-interest insiders of both parties to oppose raising the debt ceiling, defund Planned Parenthood, stop the Iran nuclear deal, and protect your freedoms and liberties.

Still -- I cannot do it alone.

I cannot overstate the importance of this FEC deadline and posting strong fundraising numbers.

Thank you for all that you do.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

| PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org
---
Copyright (C) 2016 All Rights Reserved | [Privacy Policy](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34419298:sJl1QfCRN:m:1:1104269936:CE01F97479854D437FB9D61768F2C129:r)

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Tom Wolf
subject: Friend, we need Katie
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

While Katie may have been my opponent for governor two years ago, I was still impressed by her dedication to working hard for Pennsylvania families.

That's how I knew Katie was the best person to serve as my chief of staff in the Governor's office -- and it's how I know she's the candidate we need to defeat Pat Toomey and serve as Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator.

Katie's got a tough primary coming up next month, and I hope you'll chip in $5 or more to help give her campaign the resources it needs to win.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-katie-mcginty?refcode=20160326w&refcode2=20160326wnd&amount=25

Katie is a proven leader who will serve with distinction as our next U.S. Senator. I know I can count on her, and I know our Commonwealth can as well.

As my chief of staff, Katie worked with me to save the Children's Health Insurance Program and she helped me expand Medicaid to more than 500,000 Pennsylvanians.

I can't overstate how important those accomplishments have been.

Katie has the experience and the determination to win this race -- but she can't do it alone and she needs all of us to step up and do our part.

Chip in $5 or more to help give Katie's campaign the resources to win the primary and put her on the path to becoming Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator:

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-katie-mcginty?refcode=20160326w&refcode2=20160326wnd&amount=25

Thank you,

Tom Wolf

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-2884334443529502720/2881762801796251648.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

Katie is a proven leader who will serve with distinction as our next U.S. Senator. I know I can count on her, and I know our Commonwealth can as well. name: Doug Stafford
subject: Rand needs you, Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for U
body:
Dear Patriot:

There's no doubt about it. Conservatives in
the Senate will have their work cut out for them in the next
session.

It's not just about who wins the White House
this November -- it's so much more.

JOIN THE MONEY BOMB
TODAY >>

We have candidates on both sides of the aisle
advocating for interference in the Middle East, potential
presidential candidates threatening to put the coal industry out
of business and we have a Supreme Court seat up for grabs.

They deciding voice on all of these things?
The Senate.

It becomes more and more clear everyday that
we need a strong voice for liberty in Washington.

We know Rand can be that voice. We've seen it
these past six years.

We just need your help to make sure he's
reelected to another term to stand up for our freedoms.

If you haven't had a chance yet, check out
Rand's latest video explaining just how important this is.

I know we've been messaging a lot this week,
but I cannot stress enough how important this end of quarter
deadline is to this race.

We only have 5 days to raise $200,000 to fund
our next steps.

Can you help us reach our goals by donating
today?

We have to show the Washington machine that
the liberty vote is alive and well -- and we still
#StandWithRand.

Join us now.

In liberty,
Doug Stafford

$10 MONEY BOMB >>

$25 MONEY BOMB >>

$50 MONEY BOMB >>

$100 MONEY BOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for U.S. Senate 2016

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: one month out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
> We are exactly ONE MONTH out from Primary Day on April 26, friend, and things are beginning to heat up.
>
> Yesterday, the Washington Post reported that our opponent's outside SuperPAC has taken more than $2 million this cycle alone from hedge-fund managers or their spouses, including $1.5 million from just one Wall Street financier.
>
> So far they have dumped $2.4 million in outside SuperPAC funds into our Maryland election. That's right, friend. They're spending $2.4 million dollars of outside money all in an effort to defeat a progressive champion of working families like Chris.
>
> **[We can't let them get away with that! If each of our online supporters like you is able to give $25 today to help out, we will reach our highest one day goal ever. There's just one month left before Primary Day, so the stakes are high please give $25 or whatever you can to help.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c87/70cdc2ba/47c90230/3968ceb/359809751/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-one-month-out?refcode=em32616&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+canrsquot+let+them+get+away+with+that&utm_campaign=em32616&source=em32616")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $15 instantly>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c87/70cdc2ba/47c90230/3968ce8/359809751/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-one-month-out?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em32616&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Donate+15+instantly+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em32616&source=em32616")** **[Donate $25 instantly>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c87/70cdc2ba/47c90230/3968ce9/359809751/VEsF/ Yesterday, the Washington Post reported that our opponent's outside SuperPAC has taken more than $2 million this cycle alone from hedge-fund managers or their spouses, including $1.5 million from just one Wall Street financier. So far they have dumped $2.4 million in outside SuperPAC funds into our Maryland election. That's right, friend. They're spending $2.4 million dollars of outside money all in an effort to defeat a progressive champion of working families like Chris. name: Joe Sestak
subject: Cup of Joe: March 26, 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
body:
www.JoeSestak.com
CUP OF JOE

March 26th, 2016
Newsletter

Good morning! I wanted to provide an update about what I've been up to and where I've traveled. Thanks so much for reading, I truly appreciate your support!

Pittsburgh, Philly, Delco, and Reading

This week, I traveled all across the state to continue meeting with regular Pennsylvanians to hear about their hopes and concerns.

For example, I visited the Veterans Place of Washington Boulevard in Pittsburgh to talk to my fellow vets, spoke to Philadelphia's 5th, 8th, & 30th Wards to discuss issues facing their communities, and was invited by the United Labor Council of Reading and Berks County to keynote their St. Patrick's Day Dinner.

I also stopped by the Norristown Democrats' annual fundraiser, spoke at the National Congress of Black Women's Delaware County annual brunch, and I stopped by the Delco Women's Club's 6th Annual Martha Wilson Brunch... I fondly remembering Martha's "3As" -- attitude, attendance, activity.

When you spend your time talking to regular people instead of focusing on the political establishment, a funny thing happens...

POLL: Sestak widens his lead

Health Care, the Trust Deficit, and Pat Toomey's Obstructionism

I stopped by KDKA's studio in Pittsburgh to talk with Jon Delano about addressing the biggest issue we have in America today -- the lack of trust in our public officials. People no longer believe that their leaders are there for them, instead of themselves. You can watch the interview by clicking the video below:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4M81Z532JU0

Notes from My National Security Press Conference

On Wednesday, I held a press conference on the strategy needed to defeat ISIS. Below are the five broad bullets I discussed, and you can read a transcript by clicking the image below the bullets.

• First, in a global war, no nation stands alone
• Second, diplomacy matters
• Third, economics is the bedrock of power
• Fourth, the new domain of warfare is cyberspace
• Finally, don't just win the war, but secure the peace

http://joesestak.com/national-security-press-conference-and-statement-by-former-admiral-and-congressman-joe-sestak/#more-2693

Watch and Share Our TV Ad!

Our first TV ad recently began airing across PA. The ad uses a common military term for having someone's back - "I've got your six" - to explain why I want to serve: to have people's six. Please click the link below to watch the ad, and then share it with your friends and family!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q2s8lm3StTs

With just one month left until the primary, every dollar counts...

Please chip in to help pay for this Cup of Joe!

JoeFacebook: www.facebook.com/joesestak
Twitter: twitter.com/JoeSestak
www.joesestak.com

Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Meet your organizer
body:
#
Dear Friend,
We're live in Maryland! Our organizers are on the ground to work with you to build a strong, winning movement. We're opening offices, running canvasses, and preparing for our get out the vote program. **Will you sign up to meet with one of our organizers?**
**[Meet your organizer»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/organizing?source=em160326 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/organizing?source=em160326")**
Bernie can only win Maryland if supporters like you participate in our campaign. We need you to vote for Bernie, but we also need you to volunteer with our organizers so we can build a robust campaign in your area.
The establishment is upping their spending and sending staff here to try to stop our political revolution. They wanted this wrapped up weeks ago - but we're still in this fight. We're still fighting because of the issues that matter to all of us. But we can only do this with your help.
**[Click here to sign up to meet with your local organizer.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/organizing?source=em160326 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/organizing?source=em160326")**
We only have a short amount of time remaining. Please take a moment right now to get connected with your organizer. Together, we'll expand the political revolution and win Maryland.
In solidarity,
Peter Clerkin
State Director
Maryland for Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Quick update on Bernie Sanders:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
You've been amazing | Friend --

Quick update: We’re still being outspent on the air in key states, we haven’t caught up in online fundraising, and our opponent could do very well in today’s caucuses in Washington, Alaska, and Hawaii.

Now, I don't want to paint too gloomy a picture -- you've been amazing. Thanks to you, we still have a commanding delegate lead, and we can secure this nomination for Hillary with your help. **Chip in before Thursday’s fundraising deadline, and we’ll send you a free Hillary 2016 sticker:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**For a limited time, you can still toss your name in the hat to meet Hillary at George and Amal Clooney's house.

| [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 3/16/16 at 12:00 a.m. (EST) and 3/31/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting “CLOONEY” to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from the campaign. Msg&data; rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to meet the Clooneys and the Clintons as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the event and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2150). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---

If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUwNzk0ODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzY0MjM2OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: You've been amazing | Friend -- Quick update: We’re still being outspent on the air in key states, we haven’t caught up in online fundraising, and our opponent could do very well in today’s caucuses in Washington, Alaska, and Hawaii. Now, I don't want to paint too gloomy a picture -- you've been amazing. Thanks to you, we still have a commanding delegate lead, and we can secure this nomination for Hillary with your help. Chip in before Thursday’s fundraising deadline, and we’ll send you a free Hillary 2016 sticker: --- ]() Thanks, Robby Robby Mook Campaign Manager Hillary for America For a limited time, you can still toss your name in the hat to meet Hillary at George and Amal Clooney's house. | --- ]() No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 3/16/16 at 12:00 a.m. (EST) and 3/31/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting to donate, or enter by texting “CLOONEY” to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from the campaign. Msg&data; rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to meet the Clooneys and the Clintons as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the event and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2150). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors. Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We just won Washington and Alaska! (117 delegates)
body:
#
Thank you, sisters and brothers!
Our campaign was just declared the winner of two more states: Washington State with 101 delegates, and Alaska with 16 delegates. These are our fourth and fifth wins out of the last six results, and there's still another caucus today where we expect to do very well.
We'll be in touch with the results from Hawaii, but this is shaping up to be a tremendous day for our campaign. And with a big showdown in Wisconsin on the horizon, it's important that we keep the momentum going.
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign today and we can win this Democratic primary, the White House, and take our country back from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/alaska-and-washington?refcode=em160326-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/alaska-and-washington?refcode=em160326-full")
When we started this campaign no one thought we would win a single state, let alone 13 out of the first 31. No one thought we could compete financially with the most prolific fundraiser in Democratic Party history, especially by relying on small-dollar contributions from working Americans.
We keep proving the political establishment and corporate media wrong. And if we continue to stand together, we are going to win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/alaska-and-washington?refcode=em160326-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/alaska-and-washington?refcode=em160326-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Katherine Van Hollen
subject: checking in...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, you are the difference between electing someone like Chris who gets results -- or not.

I apologize for emailing you tonight -- but our team tells me it is important. If you can contribute before midnight **[using this personalized link](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c85/70cdc2ba/47c9fee9/3968b0f/1927954018/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-one-month-out?refcode=em32616_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+using+this+personalized+link&utm_campaign=em32616_2&source=em32616_2")** it will give an important boost to our efforts to fully fund Chris's campaign outreach in the final month before Primary Day. **[Please use this personalized link to give>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c85/70cdc2ba/47c9fee9/3968b0c/1927954018/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-one-month-out?refcode=em32616_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+use+this+personalized+link+to+giv&utm_campaign=em32616_2&source=em32616_2")**

Thank you so much.

Katherine
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c85/70cdc2ba/47c9fee9/3968b0d/1927954018/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em32616_2&source=em32616_2") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
